spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-16. Use strict grid hierarchy.
spacing_and_layout.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large typography on left, high-quality industrial imagery on right. Maximum CTA visibility.
spacing_and_layout.benefits_section: Bento Grid strategy ('Control Room' style). Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) with 1px solid borders.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Sharp or minimal radius. rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Heavy reliance on 1px borders (#E2E8F0) for structure.

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-primary font-bold hover:bg-accent_hover transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-primary text-inverse font-semibold hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-surface font-semibold rounded-none

forms.strategy: Shadcn components heavily customized. Flat, 1px border, square edges. Focus state should use a sharp ring-2 ring-primary.
forms.multi_step: Show progress indicator (Step 1 of 3) clearly. Use robust validation.

cards.style: Flat backgrounds (white or slate-50). 1px border (border-border). No default shadow. Hover: subtle shadow-md and -translate-y-1.

floating_elements.whatsapp: Fixed at bottom-4 right-4. z-50. Do not use generic purple/teal. Use standard WhatsApp Green (#25D366) or brand industrial blue.
floating_elements.ai_assistant: Fixed at bottom-4 left-4. z-50. Minimalist dark toggle button.

specific_instructions_to_agent: Strictly avoid Inter or Space Grotesk fonts. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
Do NOT use purple gradients or soft pastel themes. Stick to the stark, industrial 'Swiss & High-Contrast' palette provided.
Build a robust, multi-step Admission Application Form (Shadcn customized).
Integrate a floating WhatsApp button at the bottom-right and an AI chatbot at the bottom-left.
Include strong 'Admissions Open 2025' badges and maximum CTAs.
Highlight the 'Earn While You Learn' stipend benefit prominently.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all buttons, inputs, and interactive elements.
Make the UI strictly mobile-first with 100% responsiveness.
Avoid centering everything. Use asymmetrical layouts with strong left alignments to create visual tension.
